allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $pages = @\("/jobs", "/jobs/1", "/jobs/2", "/jobs/applications"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "$p — $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$p — ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/profile" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Badge & Achievements"\) { Write-Host "✓ Profile page OK" } else { Write-Host "Content: " + $r.Content.Substring\(0, 200\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/profile" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200 -and $r.Content.Length -gt 5000\) { Write-Host "✓ Profile page loaded successfully \($\(\($r.Content.Length/1000\).ToString\("F1"\)\)KB\)" } else { Write-Host "⚠ Unexpected response" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $pages = @\("/events", "/events/evt-1"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "$p — $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$p — ERROR" } })
